summary: Backend: 8/8 pytest passing (auth, products CRUD+replenish, clients CRUD+detail, sales flow with stock decrement & client balance increment, insufficient-stock 400, payments decrement balance, dashboard structure, logout). Frontend: login -> dashboard with all KPIs and low-stock panel renders; Vender flow (add to cart, select client, Registar venda) succeeded -> dashboard recent sales shows new sale 8,00 EUR; Stock add product + Carregar (replenish) both show success toasts; Ficha do Cliente reachable; logout returns to login. Currency formatted as pt-PT EUR throughout. No critical bugs found.

issues: Recharts emits width(-1)/height(-1) warning on initial mount; chart still renders. Could add minWidth/minHeight or aspect to ResponsiveContainer to silence.

action_items: Optional: stabilize Recharts ResponsiveContainer to remove width/height(-1) console warnings.

Note: CORS uses allow_origins='*' combined with allow_credentials=True; browsers reject credentialed requests with wildcard. Currently OK because frontend is same-origin via ingress, but set CORS_ORIGINS to explicit origin for safety.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: set_auth_cookie hardcodes secure=True & samesite='none'. Fine for HTTPS preview; would break local HTTP dev.
Sales create: stock decrement & client balance update are not transactional; partial failure could leave inconsistent state. Acceptable for MVP, consider Mongo transaction.
CORS allow_origins fallback is '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers will refuse credentialed XHR with wildcard. Recommend setting CORS_ORIGINS in .env explicitly.
seed_data_creation: Test created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed products/clients via pytest; UI test created one TEST_UI client and one TEST_UI product (not cleaned up) and recorded one 8,00 EUR sale. Minor residual data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints under /api are working with httpOnly cookie auth. Frontend data-testids match the spec. Use /app/backend/tests/test_bar_api.py for regression.
